dashboard_meta.architecture: Layer 1 agents are sealed independent raw signal producers. No cross-agent communication.

agents.summary: USD Layer 1 raw call generated from sealed independent workflow.

24h.reason: USD is a bullish lean as US 2Y yield rising supports USD, but this is offset by narrowing US-Germany 2Y spread and declining DXY which weigh bearish. Missing key inputs like Fed bias and US economic surprises reduce conviction. Primary drivers show conflict lowering confidence.

F10 Equity Direction vs USD Correlation.reason: Equities falling in risk-on regime signals USD bullish, but equities regime input is risk_on but NQ d1 falling suggests bullish; however per rules, equities falling in risk-on is bullish, so this factor should be BULLISH not bearish. Correction applied.
F10 Equity Direction vs USD Correlation.evidence: Risk-on regime with VIX < 16, equities down NQ d1 -4.8%

conviction_model.final_conviction_logic: Active weight moderate at 78 with narrow bullish margin of 10; missing inputs penalize conviction by 5 points; primary drivers show both bullish (F2) and bearish (F3) conflict, so conflict penalty of 7 applied; final conviction capped at 58 rounded to nearest integer
